payload.description: East-west transit connection across Southern Brooklyn, identified as potential SBS candidate in 2009 BRT Phase II Study

tool_args.label: Flatlands Ave at Ave I intersection redesign

payload.description: Simplify intersection by converting Ave I to one-way westbound for this block, add angled parking, shorten crosswalks by expanding corner, add eastbound bus lane from E 57 St to Ralph Ave

tool_args.label: Flatlands Ave at Ralph Ave intersection redesign

payload.description: Close slip lane, add pedestrian island, bus lane, eastbound left turn banned, two right turn only lanes on Ralph Ave, northbound left turn banned, signal timing changes for improved safety and traffic flow, better synchronization of traffic lights along Flatlands

tool_args.label: Flatlands Ave (E 80 St to Rockaway Pkwy) lane widening

payload.description: Widen travel lanes, bus stops, parking lanes to reduce lane conflicts; remove small, narrow, lightly used left turn bays along Flatlands Ave; keep turn bays at major intersections (E 80 St, Remsen, Rockaway Pkwy)
payload.location_text: Flatlands Ave from E 80 St to Rockaway Pkwy

normalized_location.raw_text: Flatlands Ave from E 80 St to Rockaway Pkwy

tool_args.label: Glenwood Rd Westbound Bus Lane and Station Connection

payload.description: Westbound bus lane along north curb of Glenwood Rd between E 98 St and E 103 St; direct bus connection to Canarsie-Rockaway Pkwy station; eastbound open to all traffic, westbound buses only; DO NOT ENTER/EXCEPT BUSES signs at Glenwood Rd and E 98 St
payload.location_text: Glenwood Rd from Rockaway Pkwy to E 103 St

normalized_location.raw_text: Glenwood Rd from Rockaway Pkwy to E 103 St

tool_args.label: Flatlands Ave bus lanes (E 103 St to Pennsylvania Ave)

payload.description: Westbound bus lane from Pennsylvania Ave to E 105 St; eastbound bus lane from E 103 St to Louisiana Ave; Glenwood Rd bus lane from E 103 St to Rockaway Pkwy Station
payload.location_text: Flatlands Ave from E 103 St to Pennsylvania Ave

normalized_location.raw_text: Flatlands Ave from E 103 St to Pennsylvania Ave

tool_args.label: Kings Hwy/Nostrand Ave transit + pedestrian treatments

payload.description: Transit and pedestrian treatments at Kings Hwy and Nostrand Ave
Intersection redesign and potential re-route at Kings Hwy and Ave K
Present draft plan to community boards and elected officials; continue stakeholder outreach

Update street design based on community feedback; begin implementation for critical safety and transit accessibility locations: Kings Hwy at Nostrand, Kings Hwy at Flatbush, Flatlands Ave at Ralph Ave
Present final plan to community boards and elected officials; continue stakeholder outreach
Implement project street designs, SBS stop amenities; Launch B82 Southern Brooklyn Select Bus Service

tool_args.label: Flatlands Ave at Ralph Ave crashes 2010-2014

payload.scope: Highest # of crashes on B82 corridor (2010-2014: 103 crashes resulting in 134 injuries)

tool_args.label: Flatlands Ave at Ralph Ave injuries 2010-2014

payload.claim_text: SBS has brought: 10-30% faster bus speeds; About 10% increase in ridership; More reliable service; Customer satisfaction of 95%; Safer streets / reduction in crashes
Connects to D N F B Q L subway lines and 21 bus routes, including B44 Nostrand SBS and B46 Utica SBS
